{{ call $.T (printf "json.home.group.%s" .) }} {{ groupCount $.AllTools . }}

{{ $g := . }} {{ range $.AllTools }}{{ if eq .Group $g }} {{ .Icon }}

{{ end }}{{ end }}
{{ end }}

{{ .Badge }} {{ end }}
{{ end }}
